nodes.name: q4.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark Q4 benchmark query computing the average closing price per category for auctions matched to their winning bids.

nodes.name: q5-many-windows-temporal-filter.sql
nodes.summary: Multi-window temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q5 finding the hottest auctions by bid count across many overlapping sliding windows.

nodes.name: q5-many-windows.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view for the many-windows variant of Nexmark Q5.

nodes.name: q5-many-windows.sql
nodes.summary: Many-windows variant of Nexmark Q5 testing RisingWave's ability to handle many overlapping sliding window aggregations simultaneously.

nodes.name: q5-rewrite-temporal-filter.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view for the rewrite temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q5.

nodes.name: q5-rewrite-temporal-filter.sql
nodes.summary: Rewritten temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q5 using an alternative query formulation to find auctions with the most bids in a window.

nodes.name: q5-rewrite.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view for the rewrite variant of Nexmark Q5.

nodes.name: q5-rewrite.sql
nodes.summary: Rewritten variant of Nexmark Q5 using an alternative approach (e.g., tumbling window rewrite) to find the most active auctions.

nodes.name: q5-temporal-filter.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view for the temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q5.

nodes.name: q5-temporal-filter.sql
nodes.summary: Temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q5 finding the hottest auctions in a sliding window, applying a recency filter to reduce state.

nodes.name: q5.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the standard Nexmark Q5 query.

nodes.name: q5.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark Q5 benchmark query identifying the auction with the most bids in the last hour using a sliding window over the bid stream.

nodes.name: q6-group-top1-temporal-filter.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view for the group-top1 temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q6.

nodes.name: q6-group-top1-temporal-filter.sql
nodes.summary: Group-top-1 temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q6 computing average closing prices per seller using a top-1-per-group deduplication, with recency filtering.

nodes.name: q6-group-top1.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view for the group-top-1 variant of Nexmark Q6.

nodes.name: q6-group-top1.sql
nodes.summary: Group-top-1 variant of Nexmark Q6 computing the average selling price per seller using windowed deduplication to find the latest winning bid per auction.

nodes.summary: Rewrite temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q7 finding the highest bid per auction window using an alternative formulation with recency filtering.
